data.title: Write e2e test scenario for relates_to drift detection and brainstorm link suggestion
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description

Create an end-to-end test that verifies both the drift detection path (sprint-drift-check.sh) and the brainstorm suggestion path (epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md) work together for relates_to linked epics.

### Test Scenario
1. Create two mock epics (epic-A and epic-B) linked via relates_to
2. Create implementation plan tasks under epic-A (with PREPLANNING_CONTEXT timestamp)
3. Close epic-B (set status=closed with closure timestamp after the impl plan timestamp)
4. Run sprint-drift-check.sh on epic-A
5. Assert RELATES_TO_DRIFT is emitted with epic-B's ID
6. Also verify the brainstorm suggestion path: with an open epic that has overlapping file impact, verify the structural boundary test for Part C suggestion still passes

### File Impact
- tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check-e2e.sh (create — new e2e test file)

### Constraints
- Use ephemeral test tickets via mock CLI (same pattern as existing tests)
- Clean up all temp dirs on exit
- Parse REPLAN_TRIGGER using canonical parsing prefix from replan-observability contract

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] E2e test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check-e2e.sh
- [ ] Test creates two linked epics and verifies RELATES_TO_DRIFT
  Verify: grep -q "relates_to.*RELATES_TO_DRIFT\|RELATES_TO_DRIFT.*relates_to" tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check-e2e.sh
- [ ] Test covers both drift detection and suggestion paths
  Verify: grep -c "test_" tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check-e2e.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
- [ ] All tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check-e2e.sh
